claims.summary: A malformed newest chamber file must not hide an older valid state.
claims.disposition: verify newest-valid recovery and all-malformed fallback states

claims.summary: Nested room-weather schema drift should be named rather than silently treated as absent.
claims.disposition: verify exact expected-object and expected-string diagnostics

claims.summary: Inertia weather is a bounded fallback, not interchangeable producer truth.
claims.disposition: verify its source label and fallback ordering in Witness evidence

claims.summary: Witness fallback evidence must remain non-authoritative.
